channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Obesity leaves lasting memory in immune cells
item.description: A 10-year study finds obesity creates an immune system memory that maintains ongoing risk.

item.title: Expert Q&A on why alcohol use is declining in Canada
item.description: Dr. Tim Naimi discusses factors behind North America's declining alcohol sales.

item.title: Scientists boost natural killer cells against cancer
item.description: New strategy enhances the cancer-fighting power of the immune system's natural killer cells.

item.title: Brain study: Group averages hide individual control
item.description: Stanford Medicine research shows averaging brain scans obscures how individuals use their brains.
